# robots.txt for zenflow.sh
#
# Entire docsite is public; no Disallow rules. Sitemap reference helps
# crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, DuckDuckBot, ClaudeBot, GPTBot, etc.)
# pick up the auto-generated sitemap.xml emitted by the VitePress build.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://zenflow.sh/sitemap.xml
